name: Squash Bars
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Shredded Cheddar Cheese (More If You Like)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the eggs.
2. Add the remaining ingredients (except the squash) to the bowl.
3. Stir until well blended and all ingredients are incorporated.
4. Fold in the finely sliced squash and mix until evenly distributed.
5. Pour the mixture into a greased 9x13x2 inch baking pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35-40 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned.
7. Allow to cool for about 10 minutes before cutting into bars of desired size.
8. These can be reheated well in the microwave.
